_comment: Rename this file to claude_desktop_config.json and place it at ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/. Replace all REPLACE_* placeholders.
_comment_2: If you installed filesystem MCP as a Claude Desktop Extension, remove the 'filesystem' block below to avoid conflict.

filesystem._comment: Only include this block if you are NOT using the Claude Desktop filesystem Extension. If you have the Extension installed, delete this entire filesystem block.
